funFacts: The wings of a Fairy Riding a Butterfly are transparent, covered in thousands of microscopic scales that reflect light to create colors.
The Fairy Riding a Butterfly drinks sweet flower nectar through a long, straw-like mouth part that rolls up when not in use.
